desc:
The long-necked thing has a hammer on its head.

It resembles a toy somewhat, but this one is undoubtedly an Abnormality.

The way it stood, it looked like it could fall from its precarious stature at any moment,

And as suspected, its head slammed the floor, unable to withstand the weight of the steel.

The flask on its back may have to be filled for this hammer to be lifted back up.

options.message: Fill it with a Sinner's blood.
options.messageDesc: Run a Lust & Gloom Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Have the Sinners forcibly grab the head and the flask to lift it up.
result:
Soon after being lifted, the head shook for a moment before dropping again.

*wham*

Its neck had no semblance of strength, tilting downward without aim.

Leaving the hollow ringing of the floor and the broken neck behind, we moved on.

successDesc:
The flask on the back fills with red.

Sated by the weight of the blood, the head lifts from the floor and points to the ceiling again.
failureDesc:
Alas, more blood was spilled than expected.

You fall to the floor as if you became the hammer.

Sated by the weight of the blood, the head lifts from the floor and points to the ceiling again.
1.title: Rose Hunter
